general.name: CrowdStrike Falcon Notifications
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>5F7EB6B6-05BA-4A66-BC18-4C9CDE8E86B6</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>5F7EB6B6-05BA-4A66-BC18-4C9CDE8E86B6</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>CrowdStrike Falcon Notifications</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Notifications Payload</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>087A5F60-726C-4745-99B6-04FC0AAF04C4</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>JAMF Software</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.notificationsettings</string><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>E837701F-864C-4232-9890-548213FC27CF</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>NotificationSettings</key><array><dict><key>AlertType</key><integer>1</integer><key>BadgesEnabled</key><true/><key>BundleIdentifier</key><string>com.crowdstrike.falcon.useragent</string><key>CriticalAlertEnabled</key><true/><key>NotificationsEnabled</key><true/><key>ShowInLockScreen</key><true/><key>ShowInNotificationCenter</key><true/><key>SoundsEnabled</key><true/></dict><dict><key>AlertType</key><integer>2</integer><key>BadgesEnabled</key><true/><key>BundleIdentifier</key><string>com.crowdstrike.falcon.useragent</string><key>CriticalAlertEnabled</key><true/><key>NotificationsEnabled</key><true/><key>ShowInLockScreen</key><true/><key>ShowInNotificationCenter</key><true/><key>SoundsEnabled</key><true/></dict></array></dict></array></dict></plist>
